verificationCommands: rg -n "packages/(transport-mux|extension-mux|triggers-mux|tasks-mux|tool-mux|hooks-mux)" package.json tsconfig.json package-lock.json .github docs packages --glob '!**/node_modules/**' --glob '!**/dist/**'

test -d packages/agent-mux/transport && test -d packages/agent-mux/extensions && test -d packages/agent-mux/triggers && test -d packages/agent-mux/tasks && test -d packages/agent-mux/tools && test -d packages/agent-mux/hooks && test -d packages/agent-mux/transport-proxy && test -d packages/agent-mux/meta/config/agent-mux

phaseSpecs.title: Move five top-level mux packages
scope: Move packages/transport-mux to packages/agent-mux/transport.
Move packages/extension-mux to packages/agent-mux/extensions.
Move packages/triggers-mux to packages/agent-mux/triggers.
Move packages/tasks-mux to packages/agent-mux/tasks.
Move packages/tool-mux to packages/agent-mux/tools.

Rename moved package names to @a5c-ai/agent-mux-transport, @a5c-ai/agent-mux-extensions, @a5c-ai/agent-mux-triggers, @a5c-ai/agent-mux-tasks, and @a5c-ai/agent-mux-tools when required by the referenced package-renames doc.
acceptance: Old top-level directories are absent and target directories are present.
Root workspaces include target directories without relying on stale top-level package paths.
Root tsconfig references point at target directories.
Package names and internal package references are consistent with the target agent-mux naming contract.
Narrow package build/test commands pass for the five moved packages.
testFocus: Add or update a metadata validation test that fails when moved package directories or package names do not match the contract.
Add or update workspace/tsconfig validation coverage for the five moved packages.
Add stale path scans for old top-level package directories.
verification: rg -n "packages/(transport-mux|extension-mux|triggers-mux|tasks-mux|tool-mux)" package.json tsconfig.json package-lock.json packages .github docs --glob '!**/node_modules/**' --glob '!**/dist/**'

phaseSpecs.title: Move hooks-mux umbrella under agent-mux/hooks
scope: Move packages/hooks-mux to packages/agent-mux/hooks.
Preserve all 12 hooks-mux subpackages as agent-mux hooks subpackages.
Rename hooks package names to @a5c-ai/agent-mux-hooks-* when required by the referenced package-renames doc.
Update hooks build/test/lint helper scripts and workspace references.
acceptance: packages/hooks-mux is absent and packages/agent-mux/hooks contains all 12 expected subpackages.
Root workspace entries and package-lock resolve hooks packages from packages/agent-mux/hooks/*.
scripts/hooks-mux-build.cjs and package scripts operate on the new paths or are intentionally renamed with compatibility preserved where required.
Hooks discovery and agent-catalog contract tests pass with the new layout.
No source import or metadata reference still depends on packages/hooks-mux except explicitly documented historical references.
testFocus: Add a hooks layout contract test that enumerates the 12 expected target subpackages.
Add script-level coverage for hooks build path discovery.
Add stale path scans for packages/hooks-mux and @a5c-ai/hooks-mux-* references.
verification: rg -n "packages/hooks-mux|@a5c-ai/hooks-mux-" package.json tsconfig.json package-lock.json packages .github docs --glob '!**/node_modules/**' --glob '!**/dist/**'

phaseSpecs.title: Update repo-wide references, CI, docs, and atlas graph
scope: Update root workspace and package-lock references after all moves.
Update tsconfig references across moved and dependent packages.
Update TypeScript import paths, package dependencies, test mocks, and package script references.
Update .github/workflows build paths, action uses paths, publish lists, and artifact labels where path-sensitive.
Update packages/atlas/graph source refs, package surfaces, capabilities, and docs references to new paths and package names.
Update docs references to the new canonical package paths while preserving historical context only where clearly labeled.
acceptance: No build, test, workflow, docs, or atlas metadata reference points to obsolete moved directories for active package surfaces.
All package dependency names are internally consistent after package renames.
CI workflows build/test/publish the moved packages from the new workspace layout.
Atlas graph validation and documentation snippet/link checks pass.
testFocus: Add or update repo metadata tests covering workspace, tsconfig, workflow, atlas, and docs references.
Add package dependency consistency checks for old and new package names.
Add stale-reference scan tests that distinguish active references from explicitly historical docs.
verification: rg -n "packages/(transport-mux|extension-mux|triggers-mux|tasks-mux|tool-mux|hooks-mux)" package.json tsconfig.json package-lock.json .github docs packages --glob '!**/node_modules/**' --glob '!**/dist/**'

phaseSpecs.title: Rename legacy amux directories
scope: Move packages/agent-mux/amux-proxy to packages/agent-mux/transport-proxy.
Move packages/agent-mux/meta/config/amux to packages/agent-mux/meta/config/agent-mux.
Update Python package path references, README/docs, Docker files, package metadata, workflows, atlas graph, and tests affected by those directory moves.
Avoid broad code identifier or environment variable cleanup unless directly required for these directory renames.
acceptance: Legacy amux directory paths are absent and new target paths are present.
Proxy tests and docs refer to transport-proxy path terminology where path-specific.
Config fixture paths refer to agent-mux, not amux, where path-specific.
No active reference to packages/agent-mux/amux-proxy or packages/agent-mux/meta/config/amux remains.
testFocus: Add a filesystem/path contract test for legacy directory renames.
Add a stale-reference scan for packages/agent-mux/amux-proxy and packages/agent-mux/meta/config/amux.
Run proxy and metadata tests that fail before the directory rename and pass afterward.

phaseSpecs.title: Full integration and release readiness
scope: Run full moved-package verification after all phases compose.
Confirm package-lock, workspace installs, TypeScript references, CI workflow paths, atlas graph metadata, docs, and stale-reference scans all agree.
Refactor duplicated path maps or compatibility shims created during earlier phases.
Prepare final implementation summary with risk and rollback notes.
acceptance: All commands in verificationCommands pass or documented non-applicability is justified by environment constraints.
Every packageMove and legacyDirectoryMove is complete.
No stale active references to old paths or old package names remain.
Adversarial final review score is at least 90 with no blocking issues.
testFocus: Consolidate phase-specific tests into stable metadata and stale-reference checks.
Ensure final tests cover every moved package family and legacy directory rename.
Remove brittle test scaffolding introduced only to prove red failures.
